papers.title: Improving multimodal wearable sensing for healthcare with artificial intelligence
papers.abstract: This Comment explores artificial intelligence-driven strategies to accelerate the clinical translation of multimodal wearable sensors. We outline key data-science challenges and highlight disease contexts in which these systems could support therapeutic interventions.
papers.titleZh: AI 強化多模態穿戴式感測技術 加速醫療臨床應用
papers.summaryZh: 穿戴式感測器能即時收集生理數據，但從實驗室到臨床應用仍面臨諸多挑戰。本評論探討人工智慧如何加速多模態穿戴式感測器的臨床轉化，並分析關鍵的數據科學難題。研究指出，這類系統在心血管疾病、神經退化性疾病等情境中具有支援治療干預的潛力。隨著 AI 技術與感測技術的整合，個人化醫療監測將更加普及。

papers.title: A framework for building a synthetic cell from the SynCell Asia Initiative
papers.abstract: Building a living cell from scratch requires overcoming a bottleneck that has remained unresolved despite decades of progress: orchestrating the spatiotemporal integration of core functional modules. To tackle this barrier, the SynCell Asia Initiative outlines a strategy for developing core functional modules followed by their systems-level integration through the establishment of a centralized, artificial intelligence (AI)-driven biofoundry.
papers.titleZh: SynCell Asia Initiative 建構合成細胞的整合框架
papers.summaryZh: 合成細胞的建構是合成生物學的終極挑戰之一，其核心瓶頸在於如何有效整合各項功能模組的時空調控。本研究由 SynCell Asia Initiative 提出系統性策略，先開發核心功能模組，再透過 AI 驅動的生技鑄造廠進行系統層級的整合，為從零建構活細胞提供可行路徑。此框架不僅整合多年來零散的技術進展，更強調模組化與標準化，有望加速全球合成生物學的發展腳步。

papers.title: Programming biology: next-gen AI firms raise billions to design better medicines
papers.abstract: Faster drug discovery, optimized drug design, even programmable therapeutics: AI is impacting R&D. Data and development bottlenecks remain.

papers.title: Fetal monitoring for high-risk pregnancies using a wearable ultrasound patch
papers.abstract: A wearable ultrasound device is optimized for continuous monitoring of pregnancies.
papers.titleZh: 穿戴式超聲波貼片實現高風險妊娠連續監測
papers.summaryZh: 這項研究開發了一款穿戴式超聲波貼片，能夠對高風險妊娠進行連續監測。傳統的超聲波檢查只能提供間歇性數據，而穿戴式裝置可即時追蹤胎兒心率等關鍵指標，有助於早期發現妊娠併發症。該技術採用軟性材料設計，提升了孕婦的舒適度與接受度。對於高風險妊娠而言，持續監測能大幅降低不良妊娠結局的風險，為臨床決策提供更即時的數據支持。

papers.title: Hairpin herds corralled at the lipid droplet
papers.abstract: Lipid droplets acquire hairpin-containing proteins from the ER, but how they travel to lipid droplets and subsequently accumulate has remained unclear. With single-molecule tracking, a study now shows that persistent connections serve as bridges to lipid droplets, where nanoscale domains corral arriving proteins.
papers.titleZh: 髮夾蛋白在油脂滴上的聚集之謎揭曉
papers.summaryZh: 油脂滴是細胞中儲存脂肪的關鍵胞器，但攜帶髮夾結構的蛋白質如何從內質網移動到油脂滴並累積，一直是懸而未解的問題。本研究運用單分子追蹤技術，發現內質網與油脂滴之間存在持續性的連接通道，作為蛋白質傳輸的橋梁。更重要的是，油脂滴表面的奈米尺度結構域能夠「圈住」抵達的蛋白質，促進其有效累積。這項發現不僅揭示了油脂滴蛋白質運輸的分子機制，也為理解細胞如何調控脂肪儲存與代謝開闢了新視野。

papers.title: Membrane bridges and nanodomain partitioning govern membrane protein targeting to lipid droplets
papers.abstract: Numerous metabolic enzymes translocate from the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) membrane bilayer to the lipid droplet (LD) monolayer, where they perform essential functions. Mislocalization of certain LD-targeted membrane proteins, including HSD17B13 and PNPLA3, is implicated in metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease. However, the mechanisms governing the trafficking and accumulation of ER proteins on LDs remain poorly understood. Here using minimal fluorescence photon fluxes nanoscopy and highly inclined and laminated optical single-molecule tracking combined with machine learning, we show that HSD17B13, GPAT4 and the model cargo ‘LiveDrop’ diffuse at comparable speeds in the ER and on LDs, but become nano-confined upon reaching the LD surface. Mechanistic dissection of LiveDrop targeting revealed that this confinement, along with protein accumulation on LDs, depends on specific residues within its targeting motif. These residues mediate preferential interactions with nanoscale membrane domains, suggesting that LD-targeted proteins selectively partition into distinct lipid–protein environments that transiently alter local motion and concentrate them at the LD surface. Single-molecule trajectories further revealed bidirectional trafficking of LiveDrop across seipin-containing ER–LD bridges, providing direct evidence for lateral protein transfer across membrane contact sites. These findings establish nanodomain-based confinement as a key mechanism driving selective protein accumulation on LDs and reveal how membrane bridges between organelles facilitate protein sorting. Mizrak et al. use single-molecule tracking to dissect mechanisms of protein targeting to lipid droplets. They show that nanodomain-based confinement drives selective protein accumulation on lipid droplets.
papers.titleZh: 膜橋與奈米結構域分割調控膜蛋白質前往脂滴的標的運輸
papers.summaryZh: 本研究利用單分子追蹤技術發現，蛋白質抵達脂滴表面時會被奈米結構域困限，這種困限機制與標的序列中的特定殘基有關，決定了蛋白質在脂滴上的選擇性累積。研究首次直接證實蛋白質可通過含有seipin的ER-LD膜橋進行雙向運輸，揭示了膜接觸位點之間的蛋白質側向轉移機制。這些發現確立了奈米結構域困限是驅動蛋白質選擇性累積於脂滴的關鍵機制，並為理解代謝功能相關脂肪肝病（MASLD）的發病機制提供重要基礎，因為HSD17B13和PNPLA3等蛋白質的錯誤定位與該疾病密切相關。

papers.title: Epigenetic programming by H3K23ac defines lineage fate of Meg3+ haematopoietic stem cells and drives immune ageing
papers.abstract: Haematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) produce all blood and immune cells throughout life, but ageing progressively impairs their function, generating excessive myeloid and megakaryocyte cells at the expense of lymphocytes. This lineage imbalance contributes to immune decline, chronic inflammation and increased disease susceptibility in the elderly, yet the underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. Here we show that a specific Meg3+ HSC subset (CD150hiSca1hiCD24hiCD201+CD9+CD63+ long-term HSCs) expands dramatically during ageing and drives this lineage skewing. Using multi-omics profiling, we found that inflammatory signals increase H3K23ac levels in aged Meg3+ HSCs, enhancing PU.1 activity through recruitment of the reader protein TRIM24. This epigenetic mechanism promotes excessive megakaryocyte and myeloid production. Of note, disrupting H3K23ac–TRIM24 interaction in aged HSCs restored balanced lineage output and reduced inflammatory signals. Our findings reveal a key mechanism linking inflammation to HSC ageing and identify potential therapeutic targets for reversing ageing-related immune decline. Wei et al. show that Meg3+ haematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) expand upon ageing and present with an increase in H3K23ac levels observed already at middle age. Inhibiting H3K23ac ameliorates megakaryocyte/platelet and myeloid skewing in aged HSCs.
papers.titleZh: H3K23ac表觀遺傳編程定義Meg3+造血幹細胞譜系命運並驅動免疫老化
papers.summaryZh: 造血幹細胞（HSCs）終生產生所有血球與免疫細胞，但老化會導致譜系失衡，產生過量髓系與巨核細胞而犧牲淋巴細胞。本研究發現Meg3+ HSC亞群在老化過程中大幅擴增，並伴随H3K23ac修飾增加，透過招募TRIM24蛋白增強PU.1活性。此表觀遺傳機制促進巨核細胞與髓系細胞過度產生，導致免疫功能下降與慢性發炎。阻斷H3K23ac-TRIM24交互作用可恢復HSCs的平衡譜系輸出並降低發炎訊號。此研究揭示了發炎與HSC老化的關鍵連結，為逆轉老化相關免疫衰退提供潛在治療標的。

papers.title: Microglial mitochondria transfer to astrocytes via GPNMB-enriched extracellular vesicles alleviates cognitive deficits in tauopathy mice
papers.abstract: In PS19 mice, microglia-derived glycoprotein nonmetastatic melanoma protein B promotes mitochondrial extracellular vesicle secretion, enabling mitochondrial transfer to astrocytes. This improves astrocytic function and reduces Alzheimer’s disease (AD) symptoms, while GPNMB deficiency impairs it, highlighting new AD treatment avenues.
papers.titleZh: GPNMB促進粒線體轉移：微膠細胞透過細胞外囊泡將粒線體轉移至星狀膠細胞以改善tauopathy小鼠認知缺陷
papers.summaryZh: 本研究以PS19小鼠（一種tauopathy模型）為對象，發現微膠細胞來源的GPNMB（糖蛋白非轉移性黑色素瘤蛋白B）能促進粒線體透過細胞外囊泡進行分泌，進而將粒線體轉移至星狀膠細胞。這種細胞間的粒線體轉移機制能有效改善星狀膠細胞的功能，並減緩阿茲海默症的相關症狀。當GPNMB表現不足時，此轉移過程會受到損害，導致星狀膠細胞功能下降。這些發現揭示了GPNMB在神經退化性疾病中的關鍵角色，並為開發新型阿茲海默症治療策略提供了重要的分子標的。

papers.title: IFN-producing myeloid cells mediate photosensitivity
papers.abstract: Intercellular circuits between the myeloid compartment and T cells, keratinocytes and fibroblasts reveal how type I interferon (IFN) and sunlight drive photosensitive skin lesion development, with MMP9+CD14+ cells having a central role.
papers.titleZh: 產生干擾素的髓系細胞調控光敏感性
papers.summaryZh: 本研究揭示了光敏性皮膚病變的細胞機制，發現髓系細胞、T細胞、角質細胞與纖維母細胞之間存在複雜的細胞間訊號傳導網絡。第一型干擾素（IFN）與陽光照射共同作用，驅動光敏性皮膚損傷的發生。其中，MMP9+CD14+細胞在此過程中扮演核心角色，為開發光敏性疾病的新療法提供了重要的分子標的與理論基礎。

papers.title: You talkin’ to me?
papers.abstract: Public trust and policy impact depend on communication in local languages. Nonetheless, one language, English, dominates scientific publishing. Multilingual science communication is not outreach — it is part of research responsibility.

papers.title: Lysosomal cholesterol overload impairs the innate–adaptive immune axis in tuberculosis granulomas
papers.abstract: Mycobacterium tuberculosis infection disrupts macrophage cholesterol homeostasis, impairing antigen presentation and macrophage–T cell crosstalk, which weakens bacterial control in necrotic granulomas. Carefully timed targeting of this response shows early promise as a host-directed therapy to improve control of tuberculosis.
papers.titleZh: 溶酶體膽固醇過量削弱結核肉芽腫的先天-適應性免疫軸
papers.summaryZh: 本研究發現，結核桿菌感染會導致巨噬細胞內溶酶體膽固醇堆積，破壞膽固醇平衡，進而削弱抗原呈現與巨噬細胞-T細胞的交互作用，使得細菌在壞死性肉芽腫中難以被控制。研究結果揭示了膽固醇失調與免疫功能受損之間的因果關係，並指出在特定時間窗口干預此路徑可恢復免疫軸的效能。最後，研究顯示針對膽固醇代謝的宿主導向療法在早期實驗中顯示出改善結核控制的潛力，為開發新型治療策略提供了重要依據。

papers.title: Wall teichoic acids regulate peptidoglycan synthesis to maintain rod shape in Bacillus subtilis
papers.abstract: Wall teichoic acids confer rod shape in the Gram-positive model organism Bacillus subtilis by occluding pores in the cell wall, thereby preventing runaway isotropic (non-oriented) peptidoglycan synthesis.
papers.titleZh: 壁壁壁酸調節肽聚糖合成以維持枯草芽孢桿菌的桿狀形態
papers.summaryZh: 本研究揭示了壁壁壁酸（WTAs）在維持革蘭氏陽性菌枯草芽孢桿菌桿狀形態中的關鍵作用。研究發現壁壁壁酸能夠堵塞細胞壁上的孔隙，從而防止肽聚糖的失控各向同性（非定向）合成，確保細胞維持正確的桿狀結構。這項發現為理解革蘭氏陽性菌細胞壁的結構調控機制提供了重要見解，並可能為開發新型抗菌藥物提供有價值的分子靶點。

papers.title: Correction: Somatosensory input drives membrane potential dynamics in motor cortex during voluntary limb movement
Editorial Note: The Signal Sequence Coding Region Promotes Nuclear Export of mRNA
From germline immortality to somatic rejuvenation: Unlocking the ovarian blueprint for longevity
papers.abstract: Aging is typically framed as a one-way, irreversible accumulation of molecular damage in cells and tissues, leading to progressive functional decline. Yet mammalian reproduction, and particularly female reproduction, reveals a striking exception to this rule. Despite residing within an aging organism and within a fast-aging ovarian tissue environment, oocytes give rise to embryos that begin life with restored developmental potential and youthful molecular organization. By reframing ovarian biology as a model for rejuvenation rather than solely as a site of reproductive decline, this Essay proposes that the ovary offers a powerful blueprint for advancing the biology of aging and longevity.
papers.titleZh: 從生殖系永生到體細胞回春：解鎖卵巢的長壽藍圖
papers.summaryZh: 老化通常被視為不可逆的分子損傷累積過程，然而女性生殖系統卻展現出與此規則截然不同的例外。卵子雖置身於老化的卵巢環境中，卻能產生具有恢復發育潛力與年輕分子特徵的胚胎。本論文重新詮釋卵巢生物學為回春模型而非僅是生殖衰落的場所，為老化生物學與壽命研究開闢新途徑。這項發現挑戰了傳統老化觀點，並可能為延緩老化或促進組織回春的策略提供重要線索。

papers.title: Remembrance of things past: Towards a life-course biology of aging
papers.abstract: Globally, the growing proportion of older individuals is imposing personal and societal costs. However, interventions that slow aging are possible; for example, dampened nutrient signaling pathway activity in animal models promotes better health later in life. Recent findings indicate that such interventions have long-term effects even when applied transiently in early adulthood, forming a “physiological memory.” Similar memory has been extensively documented in human epidemiology, where the health of older people is shaped by their earlier environmental exposures, such as diet composition. This Essay argues that the study of the biology of aging should encompass determinants of healthspan across the entire life course.
papers.titleZh: 追憶似水年華：邁向生命歷程的老化生物學

papers.title: Hard-to-detect mutations explain how common autoimmune diseases arise
papers.abstract: An old theory gains fresh support from advanced DNA sequencing, which can detect rare mutations in B cells from people with autoimmune thyroid conditions.
papers.titleZh: 難以偵測的突變 解釋常見自體免疫疾病成因
papers.summaryZh: 這項研究利用先進的DNA定序技術，在自體免疫甲狀腺疾病患者的B細胞中發現了過去難以偵測的罕見突變，為一個古老的理論提供了新的支持證據。這些發現有助於解釋常見自體免疫疾病是如何發生的，對於理解免疫系統失調的機制具有重要意義。研究展示了尖端定序技術在發現疾病成因方面的潛力，可能為未來的診斷和治療開闢新途徑。

paper.title: Bottom-Up Synthesis of Molecular Nanodiamond from Nanographene
Poland’s economy is thriving, but its science is dying
Conservation gains should not be at the mercy of political changes
A cautious voice on the closure of China’s journal ranking list
Should there be a national museum of chemicals?
Iran’s Internet blackout: a scholar’s month in the dark
Too dangerous to release: is Mythos the start of the restricted-AI era?
Robots run this laboratory in Japan — and are changing how scientists work
Innovation starts in schools — lessons from China
Why AI can’t be trusted to write scientific reviews
When the grid can’t keep up: how South African laboratories handle power outages
